title: Task Runner fails to start due to missing module
symptom: The Task Runner fails to start and throws an error indicating that it cannot find the 'moment-with-locales' module.
applies_when: Environment variable N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED is set to true
not_this_if: Modules are already installed in the Docker container
root_cause: The error occurs because the required external modules have not been installed in the Docker container where n8n is running. The NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL variable only allows importing these modules but does not install them.
fix_steps: Access the Docker container running n8n
Install the missing modules using npm, e.g., 'npm install moment-with-locales'
agent_instruction: Install the missing external modules in the Docker container and restart n8n.
